author: claude-code-agent

patch.value: SDK invoke helpers for search providers, vector store adapters and migrations

Complete the extension-invoke testing surface so every executable registration surface has a runRegistered*ForTest helper to match its assertRegistered* counterpart. Adds runRegisteredSearchProviderForTest (query/embed/embedBatch/queryExpansion/rerank), runRegisteredVectorStoreAdapterForTest (query/upsert/delete), and runRegisteredMigrationForTest (run). Each resolves the registered definition via the same runtime resolver the host uses (resolveRegisteredSearchProvider, resolveRegisteredVectorStoreAdapter, getMigrationRuntimeDefinition), invokes runtime_definition over definition, and throws a descriptive error when the registration or operation is absent. Closes the gap left by pm-miqm/pm-owm0 which covered commands, hooks and the five overrides but not these three operation surfaces.
Package authors can unit-test the runtime behavior of custom search providers, vector store adapters and migrations through stable SDK entry points, not private registry internals

message: Create feature for completing the SDK extension-invoke testing surface
